export const useToast=()=>{const[toasts,setToasts]=useState([]);const addToast=function(message){let type=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'info';let duration=arguments.length>2?arguments[2]:undefined;const id=Date.now().toString();const newToast={id,message,type,duration};setToasts(prev=>[...prev,newToast]);return id;};const removeToast=id=>{setToasts(prev=>prev.filter(toast=>toast.id!==id));};const success=(message,duration)=>addToast(message,'success',duration);const error=(message,duration)=>addToast(message,'error',duration);const warning=(message,duration)=>addToast(message,'warning',duration);const info=(message,duration)=>addToast(message,'info',duration);return{toasts,addToast,removeToast,success,error,warning,info};};export default ToastContainer;
